understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', navigating through obstacles and avoiding hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was primarily horizontal via MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT. After horizontal movement, the player continued falling in the gravity direction until landing on a solid tile. CLICK actions removed breakable tiles, creating new fall paths. Hazards like spikes ended the game if landed on. UNDO reverted the previous move, allowing correction of mistakes.
